mapper.sql: SELECT l.lead_id, l.lead_no, l.company_name, l.contact_name, l.contact_phone, l.contact_email, l.position, l.industry, l.company_size, l.address, l.lead_source, l.activity_id, l.requirement_desc, l.lead_score, l.lead_grade, l.lead_status, l.is_public, l.user_id, l.dept_id, l.receive_time, l.receive_status, l.receive_remark, l.receive_apply_user_id, l.receive_apply_time, l.last_follow_time, l.ineffective_reason, l.ineffective_remark, l.convert_customer_id, l.convert_time, l.del_flag, l.create_by, l.create_time, l.update_by, l.update_time, l.remark, u.nick_name as user_name, d.dept_name, u2.nick_name as receive_apply_user_name FROM mk_lead l LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON l.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON l.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u2 ON l.receive_apply_user_id = u2.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_lead (lead_no, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, position, industry, company_size, address, lead_source, activity_id, requirement_desc, lead_score, lead_grade, lead_status, is_public, user_id, dept_id, receive_time, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{leadNo}, #{companyName}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{position}, #{industry}, #{companySize}, #{address}, #{leadSource}, #{activityId}, #{requirementDesc}, #{leadScore}, #{leadGrade}, #{leadStatus}, #{isPublic}, #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{receiveTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE mk_lead SET del_flag = '2' WHERE lead_id IN #{leadId}
mapper.update: UPDATE mk_lead SET is_public = '0', user_id = #{userId}, dept_id = #{deptId}, receive_status = '2', receive_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE lead_id = #{leadId}

UPDATE mk_lead SET is_public = '0', user_id = receive_apply_user_id, dept_id = #{deptId}, receive_status = '2', receive_remark = #{receiveRemark}, receive_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE lead_id = #{leadId}

UPDATE mk_lead SET receive_status = '3', receive_remark = #{receiveRemark}, receive_apply_user_id = NULL, receive_apply_time = NULL, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE lead_id = #{leadId}

UPDATE mk_lead SET is_public = '0', user_id = #{userId}, dept_id = #{deptId}, receive_status = '2', receive_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE lead_id IN #{leadId} AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE mk_lead SET lead_status = #{leadStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE lead_id IN #{leadId} AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE mk_lead SET is_public = '1', user_id = NULL, dept_id = NULL, receive_status = '0', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE lead_id = #{leadId}
